name: Buyer DB Re-engagement email #4
body:
Hi %contact_first_name%,

My site aims to makes it easy to shop Las Vegas and Henderson communities.

Explore established and upcoming communities on my site by visiting: https://www.thevegasagent.com/communities

If you'd like more information on a community, let me know and I'll reach out with some helpful information!

Here is your custom to you home search website, %custom_ylopo_listing_alert%

Happy shopping!
subject: Explore Communities in the Valley
